scripts.setup: docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d && pnpm db:generate && pnpm --filter @dooh/db migrate:deploy && pnpm db:seed
scripts.vercel:build:web: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir apps/web run build
scripts.vercel:build:api: pnpm db:generate && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json && pnpm --dir packages/db run build && pnpm --dir apps/api run build
scripts.vercel:lint:api: node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/shared/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p packages/db/tsconfig.json --noEmit && node node_modules/typescript/bin/tsc -p apps/api/tsconfig.json --noEmit
